mapper.select: select o.*,b.id user_id,b.bemail user_bemail,b.bpwd user_bpwd from orderbasetable o,busertable b where o.busertable_id=b.id
select o.*,b.id user_id,b.bemail user_bemail,b.bpwd user_bpwd from orderbasetable o,busertable b where o.busertable_id=b.id limit #{startIndex},#{pageSize}
select sum(amount) totalamount, DATE_FORMAT(orderdate,'%Y-%m')months from orderbasetable where status=1 and orderdate>DATE_SUB(CURDATE(),INTERVAL 1 year) group by months

select sum(amount) totalamount,gt.typename from orderbasetable o,orderdetail od,goodstable g,goodstype gt where o.id=od.orderbasetable_id and od.goodstable_id=g.id and g.goodstype_id=gt.id and status=1 and orderdate>DATE_SUB(CURDATE(),INTERVAL 1 year) group by gt.typename
